description: ol-duplicate-binder (issue #407/F8): a `reduce` whose accumulator name collides with ONE of its destructuring item-binder's pattern names (`reduce x [:x :y] in …` — the accumulator `x` reuses the pattern's first name) is exactly as ambiguous as the existing bare-name-vs-bare-name case, so it must also raise `ol-duplicate-binder` with `form:"reduce"` instead of silently letting the accumulator shadow/overwrite the pattern binding on every turn. The span points at the colliding pattern name `:x`.
